title: Is representing India worth it? The draining family cost of raising a chess star
content: India’s chess boom is inspiring young talents, but families face huge financial and logistical struggles behind the scenes. Parents spend lakhs on foreign tournaments, visas, travel, and coaching, often without sponsorship or federation support. Many also deal with poor tournament systems in India and scams abroad. Despite rising success stories like Vaishali and Gukesh, chess parents say survival in the sport remains extremely difficult.

title: ‘Did this because BJP came to power’: Suvendu Adhikari aide’s mother seeks life term for killers
content: Chandranath Rath's mother has called for justice following her son's tragic death at the hands of his assailants, demanding life sentences for the perpetrators. She argues that the attack is a direct consequence of the political upheaval tied to BJP's ascent in power.

title: What Shivon Zilis, mother of Musk’s 4 children, told court about her relationship with Tesla CEO
content: Shivon Zilis, former OpenAI board member and mother to Elon Musk's four children, testified about their relationship. She revealed a one-off romantic encounter with Musk, which evolved into a friendship and co-parenting arrangement after he proposed fathering her children due to her health concerns. Initially, Musk's paternity was kept confidential, with Zilis informing Sam Altman later.

title: Pat Cummins offered massive 12 million dollars contract deal to stay with...
content: Australian cricket captain Pat Cummins is reportedly set for a significant contract extension. Cricket Australia is offering a deal that could see him earn nearly AUD 4 million annually until 2029. This move aims to secure top stars amidst the growing allure of global franchise leagues.

title: China should not have ... : Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang after share falls to zero in Beijing
content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang declared America a priority for advanced chip sales, stating China should not have access to the "latest and greatest" AI technology. However, he urged the US not to abandon the Chinese market entirely, arguing that global sales and increased tax revenues strengthen American economic and national security.

title: Bihar cabinet expansion: Nishant Kumar among leaders inducted in Samrat Choudhary govt
content: Bihar's cabinet is set for a major expansion. Nishant Kumar, son of Nitish Kumar, is poised to join the ministry. This move follows the NDA's victory in the assembly polls. Senior NDA leaders are expected to attend the ceremony. The expansion aims to strengthen the alliance and accelerate development in Bihar.

title: ‘A reckless, foolish decision’: Warner to accept responsibility in drink-driving case
content: Former Australian cricketer David Warner will accept responsibility for a "reckless" and "foolish" drink-driving offence. His lawyer stated Warner deeply regrets the incident, acknowledging he made a poor decision to drive after consuming three glasses of wine. The 39-year-old star expects to face consequences like any other citizen.

title: As Microsoft divides VP Rajesh Jha’s responsibilities, here’s who gets what
content: Microsoft is reorganizing its leadership following Rajesh Jha's retirement. Key divisions like Windows, Office, and Copilot are being reassigned to senior executives. This shake-up aims to align product groups with the company's AI and cloud focus. Several leaders will now report directly to CEO Satya Nadella as part of this significant internal shift.

title: Gold, silver price prediction: Will gold head to Rs 1.60 lakh/10 grams? Check outlook
content: Gold and silver price prediction today: Gold and silver prices may continue to rise, with both precious metals exhibiting a bullish bias, says Abhilash Koikkara, Head - Forex & Commodities, Nuvama Professional Clients Group.

title: Ex-India pacer Salil Ankola battling depression, undergoing treatment
content: Former India and Mumbai fast bowler Salil Ankola is undergoing treatment for severe depression at a rehab centre near Pune. His wife, Ria Ankola, confirmed he was admitted after struggling to cope with his mother's passing in October 2024. The family is optimistic about his recovery, highlighting his fighter spirit and the support he has received from the cricket fraternity.

title: Fake number plate, Glock pistols used to kill Suvendu Adhikari's aide: How it happened
content: BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari's aide, Chandranath Rath, was shot dead in a meticulously planned ambush near Kolkata airport. Multiple bike-borne shooters, possibly using sophisticated firearms and a vehicle with a fake number plate, intercepted Rath's SUV and fired at close range.

title: Simone Biles 'in therapy' as Jonathan Owens eyes NFL return
content: Simone Biles opens up about her mental health struggles following the Tokyo Olympics, reflecting on the pressure that led her to step away from competition. In a recent interview, the Olympic champion shared how the experience changed her perspective on strength and vulnerability. Two years later, Biles continues to focus on her well-being while keeping her future in gymnastics open, including a possible return for the 2028 Olympics in Los Angeles.

title: What happened to Kyle Loftis? Questions grow after 1320 video founder’s sudden death
content: Kyle Loftis, founder of 1320Video, died Tuesday night, according to the platform’s official statement. His cause of death has not been confirmed yet. Loftis helped build one of the biggest motorsports media brands online through street racing and automotive content. Fans, racers, and creators across social media continue sharing tributes and remembering his influence on modern car culture.

title: Fact check: DNA test rumors for Dianna Russini’s sons are false parody claims
content: Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s alleged affair rumors have only gone worse in the last few weeks as she had to step down from her successful career, sparking outrage among fans. While Mike Vrabel’s life remains unchanged, all focus is on the children that Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, share together, as the popular coach gets dragged into it.

title: 9 shot in legs, 10 held as UP district sees 7 police encounters in 24 hours
content: UP Police executed an impressive series of raids in Muzaffarnagar, resulting in the capture of 10 wanted suspects during a remarkable 24-hour period marked by seven encounters. As a result of the confrontations, several assailants suffered injuries and were placed under arrest.

title: IPL playoff qualification scenarios: Punjab Kings still in control despite slide
content: Punjab Kings' strong start is faltering with three consecutive losses, raising concerns about their playoff security. Sloppy fielding and a top-order batting collapse against Sunrisers Hyderabad highlighted recent struggles. While mathematically still in a good position, the team needs to quickly address these issues to avoid entering the playoffs with a losing momentum. Punjab remain in control of qualification mathematically. But unless they quickly clean up the details, they risk entering the playoffs - if they get there - carrying the form of a fading side rather than a genuine contender.

title: Cooper Connolly creates historic IPL milestone, youngest overseas batter to…
content: Young Australian Cooper Connolly achieved IPL history with a stunning unbeaten 107 against Sunrisers Hyderabad, becoming the youngest overseas batter to score a century. Despite his remarkable knock, Punjab Kings fell short by 33 runs. Connolly's century, his first in the IPL, showcased a brilliant lone-hand effort in a high-scoring chase.

title: Why IPL teams feel home advantage has vanished as 220+ scores become the norm
content: With BCCI getting strict on keeping franchises away from pitch preparation, the endeavour is to produce uniform flat pitches conducive to high scores across venues.

title: Bengal tense after killing of Suvendu's aide; eyewitnesses recount 'point-blank' shooting: What we know
content: Suvendu Adhikari's personal assistant, Chandranath Rath, was shot dead by motorcycle-borne assailants in West Bengal's North 24 Parganas. The incident occurred shortly after the assembly polls, escalating political tensions between the BJP and TMC, with both parties trading accusations of violence and demanding investigations.

title: IPL playoff qualification scenarios: Sunrisers Hyderabad inch closer to top-4 finish
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad surged to the IPL 2026 summit with a commanding win, now boasting 14 points and a healthy net run rate.  Their batting and bowling units are peaking, with recent dominant victories showcasing renewed balance.  One more win should secure their playoff spot, with two victories potentially eyeing a top-two finish. SRH no longer look like a side trying to survive the playoff race. Right now, they look like one building toward a genuine title challenge.

title: Who was Chandranath Rath: The air force veteran who became Suvendu Adhikari’s closest political aide
content: Chandranath Rath, a close aide of BJP leader Suvendu Adhikari and a former Indian Air Force officer, was shot dead in a targeted attack in West Bengal's North 24 Parganas district. Rath, known for his organizational skills and loyalty, was ambushed while returning home. The incident has sparked political outrage and calls for a thorough investigation.

title: 'They found nothing': Jeffrey Epstein's alleged suicide note released
content: A federal judge has ordered the release of a handwritten note, purportedly from Jeffrey Epstein, found nearly five years after his death. The note, discovered by his former cellmate, contains the line, "It is a treat to be able to choose ones time to say goodbye." The document was unsealed after a request by The New York Times.

title: IPL 2026: Abhishek Sharma scripts history, hits 300 sixes to enter elite club
content: Abhishek Sharma's explosive 35 off 13 balls, including four sixes, propelled Sunrisers Hyderabad to a strong start against Punjab Kings. His quickfire cameo saw him reach a personal milestone of 300 T20 sixes in India.  Despite fielding lapses, SRH posted a formidable 235/4, with significant contributions from Heinrich Klaasen and Ishan Kishan.

title: Bengaluru techie spots neighbour filming her while bathing; accused held
content: A 23-year-old software engineer in Bengaluru alleged she was secretly recorded while bathing by her neighbour. Police arrested the accused, Karthik, after finding the video on his phone. He has been remanded to judicial custody, and a case has been registered under relevant sections of the BNS.

title: Trisha Krishnan called off her wedding with Varun Manian for this reason
content: Actress Trisha Krishnan's past decision to call off her engagement to Varun Manian is resurfacing, as she refused to give up her acting career.  Her clear stance on prioritizing her passion over marriage highlights a common relationship debate about sacrificing dreams for love.  Trisha continues to thrive in her career, proving her choice was a powerful act of self-preservation.

title: SRH create unique IPL record with unmatched Hyderabad dominance over PBKS
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a historic 33-run victory over Punjab Kings in Hyderabad, marking their ninth consecutive win against PBKS at the venue. Heinrich Klaasen's 69 and Ishan Kishan's 55 powered SRH to 235/4. Despite Cooper Connolly's maiden IPL century (107*), PBKS fell short, allowing SRH to top the IPL 2026 table.

title: How a 70-year-old survived 3 hours in sunken boat at Madhya Pradesh's Jabalpur dam
content: A family outing on the Bargi dam reservoir turned tragic when a tourist boat capsized, claiming 13 lives. Syed Riaz Hussain, a survivor, recounted his harrowing ordeal clinging to an upturned boat for two hours, witnessing his wife and daughter's mother-in-law drown. He was the last to be rescued, having endured immense fear and despair in the submerged vessel.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi ‘could be burnt out by 21’ - explosive claim on RR prodigy
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is electrifying the IPL 2026 with his explosive batting, amassing 404 runs and a remarkable 37 sixes. Experts like Michael Vaughan are hailing him as potentially the world's best six-hitter, drawing comparisons to Chris Gayle.  His rapid ascent has sparked discussions about his value and future international prospects, with Vaughan predicting an imminent India call-up.

title: 4 bikes, 8 gunmen, blocked Scorpio: How Suvendu Adhikari’s aide was gunned down
content: Suvendu Adhikari's aide, Chandranath Rath, was fatally shot and another associate critically injured in an ambush near Kolkata airport. Bike-borne gunmen chased and blocked their SUV before opening fire. Police are investigating the incident, examining both political and personal motives.

title: Mohsin Naqvi-led PCB rocked by billion-rupee crisis as PSL payment row explodes
content: Pakistan Cricket Board is under financial strain. It is seeking billions in unpaid dues from various entities. This includes Pakistan Super League franchises and broadcast partners. Some franchises have cleared their dues but are awaiting their revenue share. A major rights holder owes a significant amount. This situation is impacting the board's financial records and operations.

title: ‘IPL not as good as everyone thinks’: Cook’s bold claim stirs fresh controversy
content: Former England captain Alastair Cook defended his advice to Jacob Bethell regarding IPL opportunities, emphasizing the need for game time over just learning from top players.  Cook acknowledged Bethell has since played more, but reiterated that public criticism of the IPL is unlikely due to financial incentives and career implications, suggesting both viewpoints can be valid.

title: As western disturbance calms down, temperature to rise in Delhi
content: Delhi's maximum temperature is expected to rise gradually by 4-6 degrees Celsius over the next five days as the impact of a western disturbance wanes. Night temperatures are also predicted to climb, potentially reaching 27 degrees Celsius by the weekend. Meanwhile, the Air Quality Index has deteriorated to moderate and may turn poor next week.

title: TDP whip cites YouTube documentary on red sanders smuggler to allege YSRCP-criminal links
content: Government Chief Whip Panchumarthi Anuradha cites YouTube documentary ‘Planet Killers: The Forest Destroyer’ on red sanders smuggler Kollam Gangi Reddy, who she says was a YSRCP loyalist and an accused in the Y.S. Vivekananda Reddy murder

title: Nitish Kumar’s son Nishant among 32 to take oath as Bihar Ministers
content: The oath-taking ceremony was attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Home Minister Amit Shah, JD(U) chief Nitish Kumar and other senior leaders of the ruling NDA in the State

title: Killing as revenge for Mamata’s loss in Bhabanipur: Mother of slain aide of Suvendu
content: “As a mother, I cannot seek death for anyone. But I will demand life imprisonment for the culprits,” she told TV channels

title: T.N. Governor asks TVK chief Vijay to produce proof of support of majority MLAs; Congress says ‘yes’ but AIADMK ‘no’
content: The TVK has emerged as the single largest party in Tamil Nadu Assembly, winning 108 seats in the 234-member House; DMK’s allies CPI(M), CPI, and VCK, which have won two seats each, are yet to decide on support; IUML has refused backing

title: Tamil Nadu government formation: DMK rejects overtures from AIADMK, sources say
content: The DMK was firm on sitting in the Opposition and not interested in going against the people’s mandate, sources said.

title: Village accountant caught taking bribe for house mutation in Bidar district of Karnataka
content: The VA and an associate were caught red-handed while taking ₹2.5 lakh as advance for effecting property mutation in Bidar district

title: Naidu directs officials to develop economic model for seaweed cultivation along Andhra Pradesh coast
content: Naidu wants seaweed promoted as a livelihood for Self-Help Group women and fishermen along the State’s coast; asks officials to work with Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham on a detailed report and to tap pharmaceutical and nutraceutical markets

title: Kerala Governor dissolves 15th Legislative Assembly
content: Move follows declaration of results of April 9 Kerala Assembly polls in which Congress-led UDF emerged victorious by winning 102 of 140 seats

title: Tension grips parts of Tension grips parts of North 24 Parganas after murder of Suvendu's aide, security tightenedafter murder of Suvendu's aide, security tightened
content: Additional police forces were deployed in Madhyamgram, Doharia and adjoining localities after BJP supporters staged protests

title: Operation Sindoor a defining testament to India’s unwavering resolve against terrorism: President
content: Those who seek to threaten Bharat must know that our nation stands vigilant, united, and prepared to respond with strength, the President says

title: Centre likely to sanction ₹14,000 crore to Andhra Pradesh under Urban Challenge Fund, says Narayana
content: Municipal Administration and Urban Development Minister says works worth ₹14,000 crore are under way to ensure safe drinking water supply to every household in the State; requests State government to allocate ₹700 crore for Nellore’s development

title: TVK leader Vijay calls VCK’s Thol. Thirumavalavan, seeks support to form government
content: “Mr. Vijay called me and sought our party’s support for forming the government,” said VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan, adding the actor-politician had also sent a formal letter

title: Silence, the court is in session
content: The resignation of Allahabad High Court judge Yashwant Varma last month, amid parliamentary proceedings to remove him over allegations that burnt wads of unaccounted cash were found at his Delhi residence in 2025, has brought into focus how the judiciary holds itself to account. Aaratrika Bhaumik reports on the opacity surrounding complaints against judges, the routine rejection of information requests, and the shrinking space for criticism

title: PM to visit Bengaluru on May 10 to address 45th anniversary of Art of Living; BJP to offer reception at HAL airport
content: As this is the first visit of the PM to Karnataka after elections to five State Assemblies, the BJP State unit is gearing up to accord a reception on his arrival at the HAL airport for the party’s victory in West Bengal, Assam, and Puducherry

title: Swearing-in ceremony of new Assam government to be held on May 12
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi, several Union Ministers, Chief Ministers and deputy CMs of BJP-ruled States, and representatives from industries are expected to attend the function.

title: Royal Enfield to invest ₹2,200 crore in Andhra Pradesh; sets up first manufacturing plant outside Tamil Nadu
content: Motorcycle maker to set up plant on 267 acres at Satyavedu in Tirupati district; project to add nine lakh units to Royal Enfield’s manufacturing capacity, generate 5,000 direct and indirect jobs; first phase by 2029, second by 2032

title: Yogi Adityanath lauds indigenous defence innovations at symposium
content: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath praised India’s burgeoning indigenous defence capabilities at the North Tech Symposium-2026 in Prayagraj, where a three-day exhibition showcased cutting-edge military technologies and equipment tailored for modern warfare.

title: Inflation expected to hit 4% in April as food and global risks rise: Bank of Baroda
content: Among the three kitchen staples—Tomato, Onion, and Potato (TOP)—the Consumer Price Index is expected to rise. Tomato, for instance, became 35.8% pricier in April 2026 compared to the same month last fiscal year.

title: Naidu orders officials to ensure speedy seed supply to farmers
content: Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu allocates ₹200 crore for seed distribution; reviews paddy, banana, tobacco and oil palm procurement; says Indian School of Agriculture to be set up at Madanapalle

title: Who was Chandranath Rath? The ex-IAF man who became Suvendu Adhikari’s trusted troubleshooter
content: There had even been speculation that Rath could be entrusted with a larger administrative responsibility if Adhikari assumed a bigger role in government after the Assembly polls

title: Andhra Pradesh’s SIPB approves investments worth ₹11 lakh crore, Minister tells Collectors’ conference
content: Anagani Satya Prasad says government has accelerated issuance of adangals and passbooks, removed 1.37 lakh acres from the prohibited 22A land list; Chief Secretary Sai Prasad says Swarna Andhra 2047 Vision can be realised through Chief Minister’s ten principles

title: ED raids in Punjab in land 'fraud' case
content: ED said about a dozen locations in Mohali and Chandigarh are being searched under the provisions of the Prevention of Money Laundering Act

title: Centre extends provisions of five State legislations to Chandigarh
content: The move is part of a set of governance and regulatory reforms which are aimed at modernising legal frameworks, enhancing transparency and improving ease of living and ease of doing business.

title: One-year of Operation Sindoor: IAF releases 88-second footage of attack terror infra in Pak
content: With the Operation Sindoor marking one-year anniversary, IAF releases an exclusive footage of Operation Sindoor, showcasing precision strikes on terror camps in Pakistan

title: Kerala Assembly elections: Actor Siddique plumps for V.D. Satheesan as CM
content: In a Facebook post, Siddique said while he was delighted by the victory of Congress-led UDF, he was concerned about the internal tussle within the party over Chief Minister’s post

title: UP weather-related deaths: Yogi orders quick relief operations
content: “The administration is taking seriously the loss of life caused by storms, rain, and lightning in the state”

title: CJI was only meant to have a say in CEC/EC appointments till Parliament brought a law: Supreme Court
content: A nine-judge constitution bench headed by Chief Justice Surya Kant is currently hearing petitions regarding discrimination against women at religious sites, including the Sabarimala temple in Kerala, as well as the scope of religious freedom across various faiths

title: Rise in cybercrime but overall crime rate dropped in 2024, says latest NCRB report
content: Deaths due to drug overdose saw a 50% increase in 2024 compared with the previous year, with Tamil Nadu recording most fatalities; 5,194 cases of offences ‘against the state’ registered, a rise of over 6% from the previous year

title: No ‘bacterial infection’ found in bodies of four Mumbai family members who died after eating watermelon
content: The exact cause of the death will be known once the forensic science lab submits its report, police said

title: Tribal man from Odisha throws community feast under threat of social boycott
content: The man, Jitu Munda is, however, not complaining as donations have poured in since the disturbing visuals of him walking with the skeleton went viral

title: Assembly elections: Kerala Congress desires at least two ministerial berths in UDF govt, says P.J. Joseph
content: Joseph says ‘the issue of ministerial representation’ for the party will be settled amicably through discussions

title: With 300 elephants outside forests, Karnataka fast-tracks rehab plan
content: Minister says multiple mitigation measures are being implemented, including rail barriers, elephant-proof trenches and rapid-response teams

title: In just four months of 2026, Tamil Nadu records 2.63 lakh dog bites, 17 deaths
content: A total of 62,000 dog bite cases were recorded each in January and February, and it rose to 71,000 in March and dipping slightly to 68,000 in April; half of last year’s deaths has been recorded in just four months this year

title: Nearly 50 died on railway tracks between Alappuzha and Thrissur this year
content: Of the 48 deaths this year, 20 took place on tracks between Kalamassery and Irinjalakuda, while 17 occurred on lines connecting Irinjalakuda with Vallathol Nagar

title: Bihar cabinet approves 500 million U.S. dollars loan from World Bank
content: The Bihar Cabinet also gave its nod to impart quality training in the field of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to the members of both the State legislative assembly and council to establish Bihar as a leading state in AI

title: Former bouncer kills two sisters-in-law in Raipur after dispute with wife
content: The officer said that accused Jitendra Verma obtained a licensed pistol from the authorities six years ago when he worked as a bouncer

title: What happens if a Chief Minister refuses to relinquish office after electoral defeat?
content: Following the Trinamool Congress’s defeat to the BJP in the West Bengal Assembly elections, Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee has announced that she will not tender her resignation. Can a Governor remove a Chief Minister? What happens once the term of the Assembly expires? What legal remedies are available to challenge the election results?

title: Rajya Sabha Opposition benches set to see many changes after Assembly poll results
content: The TVK may make its debut in the RS this summer, while the Left will lose members by April 2027, the DMK by June 2028, and the TMC by August 2029; the Congress will benefit at the cost of the Left

title: Rubio to visit India for bilateral talks; Quad Foreign Ministers’ meeting May-end
content: Rubio will hold talks with Jaishankar and Ajit Doval, and call on Prime Minister Modi, in discussions that are expected to set the course for India-U.S. ties after several ups and downs over tariffs and sanctions

title: 65% of newly elected Bengal MLAs face criminal cases; 61% are ‘crorepatis’: ADR
content: A party-wise analysis showed that 152 of 206 winning candidates (74%) from the Bharatiya Janata Party have declared criminal cases, followed by 34 out of 80 (43%) from the All India Trinamool Congress

title: NC, PDP in war of words over Rajya Sabha polls, closure of seminary, ‘sidelining’ Urdu

content: Suvendu Adhikari’s personal assistant Chandranath Rath was shot three times by unidentified gunmen in Madhyamgram area of the North 24 Parganas district

content: Locked in a prestige battle with Congress’s Kamal Dewan, Outgoing Sonipat Mayor Rajiv Jain said he was relying on his public image and the work done during his nine-month stint as mayor after winning the bypoll in March last year

content: This directive came amid concerns over law and order in parts of the State, with the Election Commission closely monitoring the situation

content: The agency alleged a conspiracy by public servants and other private persons to induce homebuyers and investors through false assurances and fraudulent representations

content: Senior JD(U) leaders hold series of meetings in Patna, including at the residence of the party’s national working president, Sanjay Jha, leading to speculation over possible political debut of Nishant Kumar

content: Bengal Election Results 2026: The BJP on Monday won 208 of the state's 294 seats, while the Trinamool was reduced to 79.

content: Former Kremlin-linked lawyer and propagandist Ilya Remeslo was detained in March after he posted online that Vladimir Putin should resign.

content: The media mogul Ted Turner's death on Wednesday leaves a legacy of conservation work that spanned decades.

content: Jhalmuri is now set to be a part of the celebrations during the swearing-in ceremony of the newly elected cabinet of the BJP government in West Bengal.

content: Police sources told NDTV that the decision to withdraw the full protocol convoy was made at Vijay's own request.

content: Few people had known about the note until Epstein's former cellmate, Nicholas Tartaglione, a former police officer serving a life sentence for killing four people, mentioned it last year on writer Jessica Reed Kraus' podcast.

content: Mumbai hospital report finds no bacterial infection in four family members who died after eating watermelon.

content: Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), which made a superhit debut in the last month's assembly elections, currently does not have the numbers to form the government.

content: The memo calls on Iran to commit to a moratorium on nuclear enrichment, the US agreeing to lift its sanctions and release billions in frozen Iranian funds, and both sides lifting restrictions around transit through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Undercover Hyderabad patrol: Cop faces harassment, lewd remarks as 40 men approach during 3-hour walk
content: officers picked up more than 40 men, mostly teenagers and even middle aged men for trying to solicit women standing alone or walking alone in the streets . she spent a few hours in plainclothes on the streets of Dilsukhnagar post midnight on may 2 only to have multiple men approach her .
